name: Cole, Keyshia
source_notes:
Original entry had place of Oakland, California: Craft quotes Cole in an interview saying she was born at 11:11. She made no distinction between AM or PM. [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=X10g8AKjidI&feature=youtu.be]

On 18-Aug-2017 Sy Scholfield changed place of birth from Oakland to Los Angeles, and confirmed AM time of birth, quoting her on Twitter: "Did u guys kno I was born in LA and raised in Oakland,?" [https://twitter.com/KeyshiaCole/status/452659120571949056], "It is my Bday in the AM..." (posted 7:45pm PDT, 14 Oct 2012) [https://twitter.com/KeyshiaCole/status/257673638235475969], "I was born 11:11" [https://twitter.com/KeyshiaCole/status/886770922379542528]; and full name and place from California Birth Index: "Keyshia Myeshia Johnson, 15 Oct 1981, Los Angeles, Mother's Name: Lons."
On 20-Oct-2018 Scholfield changed time to 11:11 PM, quoting Cole on Twitter/Instagram: "Thank you for ALL YOUR BDAY WISHES!!! OMG !!! I love u all back!!! I was BORN AT 11:11 SOooooooo SEND ME SOME WISHES At that time if you’re still up!!! That’ll really make my night!!!!!!!" (posted 15 Oct 2018) [https://www.instagram.com/p/Bo-PiAEAlrB], [https://twitter.com/KeyshiaCole/status/1051981229829083136].
categories: Vocation : Entertain/Music : Vocalist/ Pop, Rock, etc.
